home.cta: Strong Connections That Grow Your Business

cards.title: MÜSİAD Expo
cards.description: Through the programmes to be organised as part of MÜSİAD EXPO, we bring together thousands of business people and shape the present and future of trade by hosting a broad range of events from commercial diplomacy and B2B meetings to buyer delegations and international business forums.

cards.title: International Business Forum
description: International Business Forum (IBF) is a globally influential business development platform that brings together business people, investors and public representatives from around the world. With its B2B and B2G-focused structure, it contributes to the development of commercial relations between countries and the establishment of new partnerships.

Thanks to the international network offered by IBF, Müstakil Fuarcılık organisations gain an integrated structure that extends not only to local markets but to the global business world, creating sustainable and high value-added business opportunities for participating companies.

cards.title: MÜSİAD Expo B2B
description: The B2B Organisation held within MÜSİAD EXPO provides companies with the opportunity to establish direct business connections. At the previous event, thousands of qualified meetings were held with a buyer delegation of 850 foreign business people, yielding concrete commercial outcomes for participants.
This year, broader participation and stronger business networks are targeted.

events.cta:
Fairs, Summits and
New Business Connections

aboutUs.title: About Us
paragraphs: As Müstakil Fuarcılık, we deliver strong organisations that contribute to the development of the business world, bring sectors together and pave the way for new collaborations. For us, exhibition organisation is not simply about hosting an event; it is about creating a strategic platform that supports companies' growth, expansion into new markets and the establishment of lasting commercial relationships.

Müstakil Fuarcılık has been built on a deep-rooted vision and a strong business network infrastructure as a subsidiary of the Independent Industrialists' and Businessmen's Association (MÜSİAD). MÜSİAD's years of experience, its reputation in national and international business circles and its extensive member network form the core strength behind all the organisations we deliver. Thanks to this foundation, our fairs are not only spaces where participants showcase their products, but also meeting points where real business opportunities emerge, strategic partnerships are formed and trade finds direction.

In every organisation we undertake, we adopt an innovative and results-oriented approach that accurately analyses sector needs and prioritises participant and visitor experience. Through fairs we organise across a broad spectrum from agriculture and food to industry, technology and service sectors, we aim to contribute both to the Turkish economy and to global trade.
stats: We also possess strong expertise in the field of international exhibition organisation.
To help Turkish companies reach global markets, we organise national participation programmes for major fairs held in different regions of the world.
Within this scope, we offer our companies not only stand space but also end-to-end services such as target market analysis, the right fair selection, logistics support, promotion and B2B meetings.
Our aim is to ensure that our participants achieve maximum benefit from international fairs and are represented strongly on the global stage.
closing: Thanks to our international exhibition capabilities, we make it easier for our companies to enter new markets and support their export-oriented growth. We position every organisation not merely as a fair experience for our participants, but also as the starting point of sustainable international business partnerships.

We are a team that has made it its mission to bring together companies that want to grow with the right business partners. We act with the principles of trust, sustainability and efficiency, and we work to transform every fair into an investment opportunity that generates tangible value for our participants.

As Müstakil Fuarcılık, we believe that a connection established at the right time on the right platform can turn into the strongest partnerships of the future. With this understanding, we continue to bring the business world together and to be the starting point of new success stories.

associations.title: MÜSİAD – Independent Industrialists' and Businessmen's Association
description: With more than 14,000 members, a structure representing 60,000 businesses and an employment capacity of approximately 1.8 million people, MÜSİAD is one of Turkey's most influential business organisations. Through its organisational network reaching 81 provinces across Turkey and 100 points in 85 countries abroad, it offers a strong global trade ecosystem.

Standing out through its close cooperation with public institutions and its contributions to policy development processes, MÜSİAD actively continues its mission of being the voice of the business world. Müstakil Fuarcılık deepens its activities at national and international scale through the network and sphere of influence provided by this strong structure.

associations.title: MÜSİAD Expo
description: MÜSİAD Expo is one of Turkey's most prestigious multi-sector trade fairs, bringing together business people, investors and decision-makers from different sectors. The 2024 edition was opened in the presence of the President of the Republic of Türkiye, Mr Recep Tayyip Erdogan, and hosted more than 50,000 visitors from 114 countries, including 8,000 international visitors.

With its high-profile participant structure, international visitor network and the trade volume it generates, MÜSİAD Expo is not only a fair but also a powerful B2B and B2G business development platform. This organisational accumulation adds direct value to all projects of Müstakil Fuarcılık.

associations.title: IBF – International Business Forum
description: The International Business Forum (IBF) is a globally effective business development platform that brings together business people, investors and public representatives from around the world. With its B2B and B2G-oriented structure, it contributes to the development of cross-border trade relations and the establishment of new partnerships.

Thanks to the international connection network offered by IBF, Müstakil Fuarcılık organisations gain a structure integrated not only with local markets but also with the global business world, creating sustainable and high value-added business opportunities for participating companies.

hero.badge: A fair-focused digital solution for companies using MÜSİAD
hero.title: Plan, manage and convert your fair meetings into profit
hero.desc: Müstakil Connect is a smart fair management application that helps plan, track and convert all B2B meeting processes before, during and after the fair into sustainable business relationships.

featureCard.title: With Müstakil Connect
bullets: Plan your meetings in advance
Make your fair programme visible and trackable
Record all B2B contacts
Manage post-fair actions without delay
Convert connections into sustainable business relationships

infoCards: Plan your meetings with Müstakil Connect, set your fair programme and easily track your B2B meetings.
Our sole aim is to help you earn back your time and budget investment in the fair many times over.

why.title: Fairs are not just for visibility — they are for results
why.desc: Attending a fair is a significant investment in terms of time, team and budget. However, without the right planning and tracking system, most contacts made during the fair remain scattered and are lost before converting into commercial value.

problems.title: Most common post-fair problems
bullets: Who was met with remains disorganised
What each company requested is forgotten
Priority follow-ups are delayed
Potential business opportunities are lost
The real output of the investment cannot be measured

solution.title: What does Müstakil Connect provide?
solution.text: Müstakil Connect is a digital application that provides meeting planning, B2B appointment tracking, meeting notes, task management and post-fair relationship continuity. Before the fair you know who you will meet, during the fair all contacts are recorded, and after the fair meetings are tracked in a controlled manner and converted into commercial results.

features.title: What can you do with Müstakil Connect?
features.desc: The application offers a simple, fast and results-oriented usage structure to make the fair experience more efficient.

items.title: Plan meetings in advance
items.text: Before going to the fair, identify your target companies, create your meeting schedule and clarify who you will meet, when and for what purpose.

items.title: Make your fair programme visible
items.text: Create an organised, trackable and controlled fair flow for the whole team. Act strategically rather than without a plan.

items.title: Record your B2B meetings
items.text: Manage every meeting in a single place with company information, contact details, needs and notes. Don't let important details get lost.

items.title: Manage actions
items.text: Advance proposal sending, callbacks, meeting planning, sample sending and collaboration tracking with task logic.

items.title: Continue the process after the fair
items.text: After the fair, continue your communication with companies you connected with and convert relationships into business opportunities.

items.title: Corporate yet practical
items.text: Bring your teams together on the same goal with a simple interface that is quick to learn, easy to adopt and works well under fair intensity.

process.title: By your side at every stage of the fair process
process.desc: Müstakil Connect enables you to manage the entire process from before the fair to after the fair through a single system.

steps.title: Before the Fair
steps.text: Make strong preparations with target company identification, meeting planning, schedule creation and team organisation.

steps.title: During the Fair
steps.text: Manage all contacts systematically with B2B meeting tracking, company and contact notes, request recording and prioritisation.

steps.title: After the Fair
steps.text: Make the fair value sustainable with proposal and response plans, task assignments, relationship tracking and management of business opportunities.

benefits.title: Why Müstakil Connect?
benefits.desc: Because the value of meetings made at a fair emerges not just in the moment, but when followed up correctly.

contribution.title: Contribution to the organisation
bullets: Provides a more planned fair process
Offers more disciplined team management
Creates more organised B2B meeting tracking
Helps build stronger customer and business partner relationships
Creates higher return and sales potential

approach.title: Our core approach
approach.text: Every meeting at a fair is valuable. But the real success is converting that meeting into a sustainable business relationship. Müstakil Connect is not just a fair note-taking tool; it is a management tool that converts your fair investment into productivity, business connections into opportunities and meetings into results.

scenario.title: Don't just experience the fair — manage it
scenario.desc: With Müstakil Connect, your fair process is freed from scattered notes, lost business cards and forgotten follow-ups.

flow.title: Example flow
bullets: You identify the companies you want to meet in advance
You create your meeting plan through Müstakil Connect
On fair day, team members clearly know who they will meet
Every meeting made is entered into the system
Requests, notes and actions are recorded
When the fair ends, you have a trackable work list
Afterwards you continue communication with companies and convert opportunities into profit

result.title: Result
result.text: With Müstakil Connect, your fair process proceeds more organised, your teams know what to do more clearly, important meetings are not lost, post-fair actions are not delayed and more opportunities are evaluated with a strong follow-up structure.
result.bold: In short, you don't just attend the fair — you manage it.

cta.title: Grow your fair investment with Müstakil Connect
cta.desc: Plan your meetings, clarify your programme, track your B2B meetings and continue the commercial process after the fair. Our sole goal is to help you earn back your time and budget investment in the fair many times over.

travel.intro: Turkey, positioned at the crossroads of Europe and Asia, is one of the most sought-after business destinations in the world, thanks to its strategic location, modern infrastructure, and deep-rooted hospitality tradition. This page brings together comprehensive travel information for participants attending MÜSIAD EXPO and other international events in Istanbul, along with engaging content to help you discover Turkey.

infoCards.title: Visa & Entry
infoCards.text: Turkey grants visa exemptions to citizens of more than 90 countries. For those who require a visa, the fast and convenient e-Visa system is available. Applications can be submitted online at evisa.gov.tr.

infoCards.title: Transportation
infoCards.text: Istanbul Airport is one of Europe's largest airports, offering direct flights to over 120 countries. Within the city, the metro, tram, and Marmaray rail lines provide easy access to exhibition venues.

infoCards.title: Accommodation
infoCards.text: Istanbul offers thousands of accommodation options for every budget. Near the Istanbul Expo Center, you'll find a wide range of choices in the Bakırköy, Zeytinburnu, and Şişli districts — from international chain hotels to boutique properties.

travel.placesIntro: Key highlights recommended for exploring Istanbul before or after your fair visit.

places.name: Blue Mosque
places.description: Built in the 17th century with its rare six minarets, the Blue Mosque is an architectural masterpiece adorned with over 20,000 İznik tiles. It remains one of Istanbul's most iconic landmarks.

places.name: Hagia Sophia
places.description: Originally built as a church in 537 AD, later converted into a mosque and museum, Hagia Sophia is a breathtaking synthesis of Byzantine and Ottoman architecture. Its massive dome and majestic interior earned it a place on the UNESCO World Heritage List.

places.name: Topkapi Palace
places.description: Home to the Ottoman sultans for 400 years, Topkapi Palace houses one of Istanbul's richest museums — featuring the treasury, harem quarters, and gardens with sweeping views of the Bosphorus.

places.name: Grand Bazaar
places.description: One of the world's largest and oldest covered markets. With over 4,000 shops and 60 streets, this centuries-old trading tradition offers every visitor a unique labyrinthine experience.

places.name: Galata Tower
places.description: Built by the Genoese in 1348 and an indispensable part of Istanbul's skyline, the Galata Tower offers a stunning 360-degree panoramic view of the city from its summit.

places.name: Bosphorus Cruise
places.description: Seeing Istanbul from the water is an experience like no other. A Bosphorus cruise past waterfront mansions, bridges, and ancient fortresses stretching along both the European and Asian shores captures the true spirit of the city.

places.name: Dolmabahçe Palace
places.description: Built during the Ottoman modernization era in the 19th century, Dolmabahçe Palace is a magnificent fusion of European Baroque architecture and traditional Ottoman artistry — elegantly positioned along the Bosphorus shore.

places.name: Princes' Islands
places.description: Far from Istanbul's urban noise, these islands are free of motorcycles and cars. Explore by horse-drawn carriage among historic wooden mansions and peaceful coves — a perfect day-trip escape.

blogPosts.title: Istanbul for Fair Visitors: A Practical City Guide
blogPosts.excerpt: The Istanbul Expo Center (IFM) is on the Yeşilköy-Bakırköy corridor. Official access options include metro, Marmaray connections, Metrobus connections, and taxis. Istanbulkart and Istanbulkart Mobile are practical for public transport use. For accommodation, visitors can prioritize areas close to the venue or on main transport corridors. For current routes and service updates, official IFM and transport operator pages should be checked.

blogPosts.title: What to Keep in Mind When Doing Business in Türkiye
blogPosts.excerpt: Confirm the meeting time and location in advance. Prepare a short company introduction, business cards, and a concise agenda. Use respectful and professional forms of address. Choose modest, business-appropriate attire. Keep in mind that approval and decision processes vary by institution. After the meeting, confirm key points in writing by email. Prompt follow-up after the fair helps build trust.

blogPosts.title: What to Eat in Istanbul: A Food Guide for Fair Visitors
blogPosts.excerpt: During fair days, breakfast halls, home-style restaurants, grill and kebab venues, and family-friendly businesses offer reliable options. For lunch, soup, pide, kofte, doner, and olive oil dishes are practical choices. For evening meetings, quieter venues that accept reservations and are suitable for hosting business guests are preferable. It is useful to check menu content, halal suitability, and payment options before visiting.

blogPosts.title: Entering Turkey: Visa, Currency and Phone
blogPosts.excerpt: Visa requirements vary by nationality and passport type, so eligibility and application details should be checked through the official e-Visa system. The local currency is the Turkish Lira (TRY). Card payments are common, but carrying some cash for small purchases is still helpful. For short stays, visitors may consider eSIM options or local operator packages. Türkiye remains on UTC+3 throughout the year.

blogPosts.title: A One-Day Cultural Route in Istanbul
blogPosts.excerpt: A practical route can begin in the morning around the Blue Mosque and Hagia Sophia, then continue through Gulhane and the outer court of Topkapi Palace. Around midday, the Spice Bazaar and Eminonu area offer an easy stop. In the afternoon, the Grand Bazaar, Beyazit, and the surroundings of Suleymaniye can be covered together. Before visiting, prayer times, ticketed areas, and official visiting hours should be checked.

blogPosts.title: Which Sectors Offer Opportunity in Turkey?
blogPosts.excerpt: Key areas highlighted for investment and business cooperation in Türkiye include machinery and manufacturing, agrofood, logistics and transportation, information and communication technologies, energy, and infrastructure. Sector priorities can vary by project type, region, and incentive framework. For current opportunity areas, incentives, and regional advantages, visitors should verify details through Invest in Türkiye resources.
